description: Create a network topology diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax to document a company's infrastructure for a security audit. The diagram must include the following components labeled exactly: 'Internet' (Cloud), 'Main Firewall' (Firewall), 'Core Router - 10.0.0.1' (Router), 'Switch-DMZ - 10.0.1.1' (Switch), 'Switch-LAN - 10.0.2.1' (Switch), 'Web Server - 10.0.1.10' (Server), 'DB Server - 10.0.2.20' (Server), and three workstations labeled 'WS-01 - 10.0.2.101', 'WS-02 - 10.0.2.102', and 'WS-03 - 10.0.2.103'. Connect the components logically: Internet to Main Firewall to Core Router; Core Router to Switch-DMZ (connected to Web Server) and Switch-LAN (connected to DB Server and the three workstations). Arrange the diagram hierarchically with the Internet at the top or left and endpoints at the bottom or right. Save the diagram as /home/ga/Documents/network_topology.eddx and export it as /home/ga/Documents/network_topology.png.
